---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new endpoint
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What problem does this feature solve? Be specific about the use case.

**Proposed solution**
How you envision the feature working — new endpoints, new parameters, changes to aggregation logic, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you considered and why this one is better.

**Impact**
- [ ] New public endpoint
- [ ] Change to existing endpoint behavior
- [ ] Storage layout change (migration needed)
- [ ] Gas / performance impact
